article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable senior housing rules for 3460 Kalyk Avenue development
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed a bylaw requiring Jubilee Multi Generational Housing Society to keep a set number of units at below-market rents for low-income seniors at their new Kalyk Avenue building. The agreement is registered on the property title, meaning the rules stay in place even if the building is sold.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental housing in Burnaby, review whether a similar housing agreement applies to your property.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025
